headline: Xchange Marks Apprentice Week with Enterprise IT Projects for Peoples Gas and Northern Trust
summary: Xchange, a first-of-its-kind onshore IT project delivery model operating with SDI Presence as employer of record, today announced major delivery engagements with Peoples Gas and Northern Trust. The milestone further demonstrates that organizations can procure high-quality IT delivery through Xchange, with SDI supporting all talent, compliance, and accountability.
